prose:
**Oxygen (O₂) frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, RI-J density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (unrestricted Kohn–Sham). Geometry: single-point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz` (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported; integrity check: trustworthy.
HOMO = −8.8739616 eV, LUMO = −3.5859031 eV → gap = 5.2880586 eV

Reproducibility:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --multiplicity 3 --charge 0 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpzyo_526e/live.json`
• Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpzyo_526e/live.json`
• (A live log was being written to `frontier-<timestamp>.out` in the working directory.)
